bullets.text: Managed and resolved support tickets across Microsoft 365, Windows, networking, printers, endpoint security, and workstation issues within an MSP environment.
Provided remote technical support through calls, email, and Autotask while prioritizing urgent client issues and maintaining clear communication throughout the resolution process.
Assisted with Microsoft 365 administration including Exchange, SharePoint, user onboarding/offboarding, account permissions, MFA setup, mailbox management, and account lockdown procedures.
Worked with Windows Active Directory and domain environments to manage users, reset passwords, configure group policies, and maintain access controls.
Investigated endpoint and security alerts using Datto EDR, Graphus, ThreatLocker, Duo, Inky, and related Kaseya ecosystem platforms.
Assisted with phishing investigations, login anomaly reviews, vulnerability assessment workflows using Vonahi, and general security operations support.
Contributed to internal software projects including a custom construction job management platform and CCTV investigation tooling for automated footage analysis and incident review workflows.
Managed Linux-based deployment workflows using SSH, firewall configuration, automated backups, and secure remote access practices.
Built internal reporting utilities to investigate abnormal OneDrive synchronization and SharePoint recycle-bin activity.
Built AI Interviewer platforms (cloud + offline) using Streamlit: online version leverages OpenAI (LLM, STT, TTS); local variant integrates Ollama and Faster Whisper.
Designed pluggable provider architecture with environment-driven configuration enabling seamless swapping of LLM/speech backends without refactors.
Implemented modular service layer (llm_service.py, stt_service.py, tts_service.py) fully decoupled from UI tabs for isolated testing and future expansion.
Added streaming token output pipelines and lazy resource initialization to reduce latency and memory footprint in local mode.
Authored cross-platform one-command startup scripts (Windows & Linux/macOS) automating virtualenv creation, dependency install, and app launch.
Joined as Business Development Trainee (Sep–Oct 2024), promoted to Specialist within 2 months based on performance in client acquisition and bidding workflow optimisation.
Gained expertise in freelancing platforms (Upwork, Freelancer): bidding strategies, client acquisition, and profile optimization.
Managed clients using Odoo — scheduling calls, conducting meetings, gathering project requirements, and handling follow-ups.
Developed and optimized the bidding workflow with automation to improve efficiency and client conversion rate.
Created detailed Excel reports for tracking bids, ongoing projects, and client interactions.
Assisted in developing Chrome extensions to streamline bidding and project management workflows.
Explored MySQL Workbench for handling and managing databases.
Learned prompt engineering to train AI chat models for writing proposals and detecting technical vs. non-technical job descriptions.
Identified common bidding criteria including location, budget, skills, client verification, and hiring trends.
Understood best practices for client communication, identifying scams, and navigating NDA/IP agreements on freelancing platforms.
Researched platform-specific strategies including connect replenishment, profile boosting, and filtering methods on Upwork and Freelancer.
Handled 30–50 customer requests per day via Crisp, assisting users in creating custom popups and banners for online stores.
Integrated popups and banners with automated email campaigns for promotions.
Generated annotated screenshots and screen recordings to guide users through setup processes step by step.
Assisted clients who did not speak English as their primary language, ensuring seamless communication.
Used Slack to communicate with the development team for feature requests and updates.
Developed and customized WordPress themes and plugins (including WooCommerce) to meet client requirements.
Built and designed websites using Elementor, optimizing for performance, security, and SEO.
Troubleshot WordPress-related issues, ensuring a seamless user experience across client sites.
Explored Laravel fundamentals, gaining foundational knowledge of backend development in PHP.
Developed and delivered Android applications in Java/Kotlin, ensuring smooth performance and intuitive UX.
Collaborated with design and product teams on app interfaces; conducted code reviews and followed best practices.
Tracked development sprints and daily tasks using Trello.
